Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Resolved and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Completed + Resolved in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Resolved when preceded by Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time between Completed + In Call and Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time from Completed + In Call to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time for Completed + Resolved in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + Resolved in variants ending with Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + In Progress and Completed + Resolved when Completed + In Call occurs in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time of Completed + Resolved in cases where the impact is High
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Resolved and the end of the case

Name: Cycle Time of Completed + Resolved grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Resolved' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Average time it takes Completed + Resolved to be done after Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time for Completed + Resolved in variants that transition directly from Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Resolved following Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Time from Accepted + Wait - Vendor to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time between Completed + In Call and Completed + Resolved in high-impact incidents
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total resolution time of Completed + Resolved when the product is PROD582
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + Resolved and the end of the case

Name: Time of Completed + Resolved in variants that include multiple occurrences of Accepted + In Progress before resolution
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Elapsed time between the first occurrence of Accepted + In Progress and Completed + Resolved in variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Cycle Time of Completed + Resolved for cases handled by resource group V30
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Resolved and the end of the case
